calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Noel Mcardell To Perpetuate Testimony Of Noel Roach By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-15-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Emily M. Cunningham of HAWKINS PARNELL & YOUNG (415-766-3200) appearing through CourtCall for Intervenors for Marconi Plastering Company.
Jonathan Kim of FOLEY & MANSFIELD (510-590-9500), appearing through CourtCall for defendant Kaiser Gypsum Company.

RULING:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Noel McArdell to Perpetuate Testimony of Noel Roach by Videotaped Deposition is GRANTED pursuant to C.C.P. 2035.010. Proof of service filed as to all anticipated defendants in named petition. No opposition filed. All parties must file a Notice of Appearance within 48 hours upon receipt of this order. The deposition is to take place within thirty days of the date of this order by Zoom technology unless the parties agree otherwise. Petitioner to meet and confer with the anticipated defendants prior to noticing the deposition. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)

Notice Of Hearing Re: Petition Of Noel Mcardell To Perpetuate Testimony Of Noel Roach By Videotaped Deposition
Off Calendar Oct-13-2020 Continued To Oct-15-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
Not contested and tentative ruling adopted: The Petition of Noel McArdell to Perpetuate Testimony of Noel Roach by Videotaped Deposition is continued on the Court's own motion to October 15, 2020 at 9:30 a.m. in Department 503. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
